title: New ransomware campaign targeting cloud infrastructure
description: Security researchers have identified a new ransomware variant specifically designed to target cloud-based infrastructure. The campaign uses compromised CI/CD pipelines to deploy malicious code.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with high severity.

title: Show HN: Open-source vulnerability scanner
description: New tool automatically scans dependencies for known vulnerabilities and suggests patches. Gaining traction in the security community.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The open-source vulnerability scanner itself does not pose a direct security threat but may introduce risks if improperly configured or if malicious actors exploit its usage to identify unpatched vulnerabilities in systems. Additionally, reliance on such tools without proper validation could lead to a false sense of security.
recommended_actions: Evaluate the tool in a secure, isolated environment before deploying it in production systems.
Ensure that the tool is sourced from a trusted repository and regularly updated to avoid potential supply chain attacks.
Use the tool as part of a broader security strategy, including manual reviews and other automated tools, to validate findings and ensure comprehensive coverage.

title: A vulnerability was found in Tenda CX12L 16.03.53.12. This issue affects the function...
description: A vulnerability was found in Tenda CX12L 16.03.53.12. This issue affects the function formSetPPTPServer of the file /goform/SetPptpServerCfg”. The manipulation results in stack-based buffer overflow. The attack can be executed remotely. The exploit has been made public and could be used.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with high severity. CVE: CVE-2026-8138.

title: A vulnerability has been found in Totolink X5000R 9.1.0u.6369_B20230113. This vulnerability...
description: A vulnerability has been found in Totolink X5000R 9.1.0u.6369_B20230113. This vulnerability affects the function sub_458E40 of the file /boafrm/formDdns. The manipulation of the argument submit-url leads to buffer overflow. Remote exploitation of the attack is possible. The exploit has been disclosed to the public and may be used.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The vulnerability in Totolink X5000R firmware allows remote attackers to exploit a buffer overflow via the submit-url parameter, potentially leading to unauthorized code execution, system compromise, or denial of service.
recommended_actions: Immediately apply firmware updates or patches provided by Totolink, if available.
Implement network segmentation and firewall rules to restrict access to the affected device from untrusted networks.
Monitor network traffic for unusual activity and consider disabling the affected DDNS functionality if not required.

title: A Command Injection issue in the payload build page in BYOB (Build Your Own Botnet) 2.0 allows...
description: A Command Injection issue in the payload build page in BYOB (Build Your Own Botnet) 2.0 allows attackers to execute arbitrary commands on the server via a crafted build parameter. This occurs in freeze in core/generators.py.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with unknown severity. CVE: CVE-2024-45257.

title: LINQPad before 5.52.01 Pro edition is vulnerable to Unsafe Deserialization in LINQPad...
description: LINQPad before 5.52.01 Pro edition is vulnerable to Unsafe Deserialization in LINQPad.AutoRefManager::PopulateFromCache(), leading to code execution.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The vulnerability allows unsafe deserialization in LINQPad.AutoRefManager::PopulateFromCache(), potentially enabling remote code execution. This could lead to unauthorized access, data breaches, or system compromise.
recommended_actions: Update LINQPad to version 5.52.01 or later to mitigate the vulnerability.
Conduct a security audit to identify any systems using vulnerable versions of LINQPad and apply patches immediately.
Implement monitoring and logging to detect potential exploitation attempts targeting this vulnerability.

title: Prison Management System Using PHP v1.0 was discovered to contain a SQL injection vulnerability...
description: Prison Management System Using PHP v1.0 was discovered to contain a SQL injection vulnerability via the username on the Admin login page.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The SQL injection vulnerability in the Prison Management System Using PHP v1.0 could allow attackers to bypass authentication, access sensitive data, manipulate database contents, or execute arbitrary SQL commands. This poses a significant risk to the confidentiality, integrity, and availability of the system.
recommended_actions: Immediately sanitize and validate all user inputs on the Admin login page to prevent SQL injection attacks.
Apply parameterized queries or prepared statements in the database queries to mitigate SQL injection risks.
Update the application to the latest version if a patch addressing this vulnerability is available, or contact the vendor for a fix.

title: Mikrotik RouterOS (x86) 6.40.5 through 6.49.10 (fixed in 7) allows a remote attacker to cause a...
description: Mikrotik RouterOS (x86) 6.40.5 through 6.49.10 (fixed in 7) allows a remote attacker to cause a denial of service (device crash) via crafted packet data to the SMB service on TCP port 445.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The vulnerability allows remote attackers to crash Mikrotik RouterOS devices by sending crafted packets to the SMB service on TCP port 445, potentially causing denial of service and disrupting network operations.
recommended_actions: Immediately update Mikrotik RouterOS devices to version 7 or later to mitigate the vulnerability.
Disable the SMB service on affected devices if it is not required for operational purposes.
Implement network-level protections such as firewall rules to block access to TCP port 445 from untrusted sources.

title: A Cross Site Scripting vulnerability in Alkacon OpenCms before 16 exists via updateModelGroups.jsp.
description: A Cross Site Scripting vulnerability in Alkacon OpenCms before 16 exists via updateModelGroups.jsp.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The Cross Site Scripting (XSS) vulnerability in Alkacon OpenCms before version 16 via updateModelGroups.jsp allows attackers to inject malicious scripts, potentially leading to data theft, session hijacking, or unauthorized actions on behalf of the user.
recommended_actions: Upgrade to Alkacon OpenCms version 16 or later to mitigate the vulnerability.
Implement input validation and sanitization to prevent malicious script injection.
Conduct a thorough security audit of the application to identify and remediate similar vulnerabilities.

title: Alkacon OpenCms before 16 allows XXE when the <!DOCTYPE> refers to an external host.
description: Alkacon OpenCms before 16 allows XXE when the <!DOCTYPE> refers to an external host.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The vulnerability allows attackers to exploit XML External Entity (XXE) processing by referencing external entities, potentially leading to sensitive data exposure, server-side request forgery (SSRF), or denial of service (DoS).
recommended_actions: Upgrade to Alkacon OpenCms version 16 or later to mitigate the vulnerability.
Disable or restrict the use of external entity processing in XML parsers if upgrading is not immediately possible.
Conduct a security audit to identify any potential exploitation of this vulnerability in your environment.

title: Alkacon OpenCms before 10.5.1 allows remote unauthenticated attackers to obtain sensitive...
description: Alkacon OpenCms before 10.5.1 allows remote unauthenticated attackers to obtain sensitive information via a cmis-online/query XXE attack on a Chemistry servlet.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The vulnerability in Alkacon OpenCms before version 10.5.1 allows remote unauthenticated attackers to exploit an XML External Entity (XXE) injection via the cmis-online/query endpoint in the Chemistry servlet. This can lead to unauthorized access to sensitive information, such as configuration files, credentials, or other confidential data stored on the server.
recommended_actions: Upgrade Alkacon OpenCms to version 10.5.1 or later to patch the vulnerability.
Implement strict input validation and disable external entity processing in XML parsers to mitigate XXE attacks.
Conduct a security audit to identify any unauthorized access or data exfiltration that may have occurred prior to the patch.

title: CVE-2026-7546 - A security vulnerability has been detected in Totolink NR1800X 9.1.0u.6279_B20210910. The impacted e
description: A security vulnerability has been detected in Totolink NR1800X 9.1.0u.6279_B20210910. The impacted element is the function find_host_ip of the component lighttpd. Such manipulation of the argument Host leads to stack-based buffer overflow. The attack can be executed remotely. The exploit has been disclosed publicly and may be used.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The vulnerability in the Totolink NR1800X router allows for a stack-based buffer overflow via the manipulation of the 'Host' argument in the lighttpd component. This could enable remote attackers to execute arbitrary code, potentially leading to full system compromise, data exfiltration, or the device being used as part of a botnet.
recommended_actions: Immediately apply any available firmware updates or patches provided by Totolink to address this vulnerability.
Implement network segmentation to isolate vulnerable devices and limit potential lateral movement in case of compromise.
Monitor network traffic for unusual activity and consider deploying intrusion detection/prevention systems (IDS/IPS) to identify and block potential exploit attempts.

description: A vulnerability was determined in Open5GS up to 2.7.7. title: CVE-2026-22726 - Route Services can be leveraged to send app traffic to network destinations outside of an app's conf
description:
Route Services can be leveraged to send app traffic to network destinations outside of an app's configured egress rules. As a result, a malicious developer with access to Cloudfoundry could configure a route-service that would allow it to send requests to HTTP services on internal networks reachable by the Gorouter, which may not have previously had direct access from outside networks, or from the application.
Routing release: affected from v0.118.0 through v0.371.0 (inclusive); upgrade to v0.372.0 or greater. CF Deployment: affected from v0.0.2 through v54.14.0 (inclusive); upgrade to v55.0.0 or greater (includes routing_release v0.372.0).

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-22726.
